title: Extra Discs
description: Collect all of your favorite songs from the Minecraft Soundtrack using Skeletons!
body:
**ExtraDiscs** is a simple music mod for Minecraft that adds Music Discs for all of the game’s music, allowing the player to listen to it on demand. The songs are divided into separate categories that all have their own methods of being obtained. 

To obtain discs in certain categories, the player must get a Skeleton to kill a certain mob. Each category correlates to a specific mob:

<details>
<summary>Overworld Music Discs</summary>
Zombies will drop Overworld Music Discs
</details>
<details>
<summary>Creative Music Discs</summary>
Iron Golems will drop Creative Music Discs
</details>
<details>
<summary>Underground Music Discs</summary>
Silverfish will drop Underground Music Discs
</details>
<details>
<summary>Underwater Music Discs</summary>
Guardians will drop Underwater Music Discs
</details>
<details>
<summary>Nether Music Discs</summary>
Ghasts will drop Nether Music Discs (C418).

Piglin Brutes will drop post 1.16 Nether Music Discs (Lena Raine).
</details>
<details>
<summary>End Music Discs</summary>
Shulkers will drop End Music Discs
</details>
<details>
<summary>Menu Music Discs</summary>
Endermen will drop Menu Music Discs (figure it out.)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Deep Dark Music Discs</summary>
Wardens will drop Ancestry, the Deep Dark Music Disc.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Creator Remix</summary>
Strike the Creator Music Disc with Lightning to de-oxidize and enchant it.
</details>

Each condition is meant to give the player a unique challenge. The pools with less items will have harder conditions, but will inherently guarantee the player has to do it less times than pools with more items in them, and vice versa. 

**Technical Specifications:**
This mod does not contain any of the music in the game, and instead registers sound entries for the songs already in the game. 

Any and all assets are purely custom and are not in violation of any copyright laws pertaining to the usage of the game’s music. Please support C418, Lena Raine, Kumi Tanioka and Aaron Cherof.

**Additional Credits:**
- [Ocelot5836](https://github.com/Ocelot5836/) for the Mono Audio Wrapper code
- [NoteBlock](https://www.youtube.com/@NoteBlock), [Jonny Atma](https://www.youtube.com/@JonnyAtma) and [Dom Palombi](https://www.youtube.com/@DomPalombiMusic) for the amazing Creator Remix (used with permission, of course).
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
...and Huggbees for... Newman-O's?
</details>
